supporting_quote: SNCA mRNA levels were measured by quantitative real-time PCR. Human primer probe set RTS2621 ... was used to measure mRNA levels. SNCA mRNA levels were adjusted according to total RNA content, as measured by RIBOGREEN. Results are presented in the tables below as percent reduction of the amount of SNCA mRNA, relative to untreated control cells (these conditions describe a "Standard Cell Assay").
notes: Ionis Pharmaceuticals patent. Standard Cell Assay: cultured SH-SY5Y cells, electroporation. RT-qPCR primer-probe set RTS2621. Quantified vs untreated control, normalized to total RNA (RiboGreen). No housekeeping gene used as normalizer.

supporting_quote: APP RNA levels were measured as previously described using the human APP primer-probe set RTS35572 ... APP RNA levels were normalized to total RNA, as measured by RIBOGREEN.
notes: Ionis Pharmaceuticals patent. Application PDF (US20230055405A1) is a scanned/image-only PDF with no text layer and no local OCR tool available; quote and confirmation taken from the granted patent of the SAME application family: US12384814B2 (application 17/387,727, published as US20230055405A1). Real-time RT-PCR (primer-probe set RTS35572), SH-SY5Y cells via electroporation, normalized to total RNA (RiboGreen). No housekeeping gene normalizer.

supporting_quote: RNA was isolated from the cells and KCNT1 RNA levels were measured by quantitative real-time RTPCR. Human KCNT1 primer probe set RTS39508 ... and human KCNT1 primer probe set RTS39496 ... KCNT1 RNA levels were normalized to total RNA content, as measured by RIBOGREEN. Reduction of KCNT1 RNA is presented ... as percent KCNT1 RNA levels relative to untreated control (UTC) cells.
notes: Ionis Pharmaceuticals patent. Cultured SH-SY5Y (neuroblastoma) cells, electroporation. Quantitative real-time RT-PCR using primer-probe sets RTS39508 and RTS39496. Normalized to total RNA (RiboGreen), vs untreated control. No housekeeping gene used as normalizer.

supporting_quote: RNA was isolated from the cells and ATXN3 RNA levels were measured by quantitative real-time PCR. Human primer probe set RTS38920 ... was used to measure RNA levels. ATXN3 RNA levels were adjusted according to total RNA content, as measured by RiboGreen. Results are presented in the table below as percent ATXN3 RNA levels relative to untreated control cells.
notes: Ionis Pharmaceuticals patent. Cultured A431 cells, electroporation. Quantitative real-time RT-PCR using primer-probe set RTS38920. Normalized to total RNA (RiboGreen), vs untreated control. No housekeeping gene used as normalizer.
